channel.title: First Time Buyer on WithinTrend — Trending Topics & Guides
channel.description: Recent content in First Time Buyer on WithinTrend — Trending Topics & Guides

item.title: First-Time Homebuyer Mistakes to Avoid
item.description: Don't learn these expensive lessons the hard way. Here are the most common first-time homebuyer mistakes and how to avoid them to save thousands on your biggest purchase.
